metadata.title: Train Smarter
metadata.description: Professional training management platform for coaches and athletes

ds.title: Train Smarter — Design System
ds.subtitle: PROJ-1: Design System Foundation. All tokens, colors, typography, and components at a glance.
ds.darkModeTip: Tip: Toggle dark mode to see the Warm-Slate dark surfaces.

ds.focusRingViolet: Secondary uses Violet as accent color.

wizard.title: Welcome to Train Smarter
wizard.subtitle: Let's set up your account. This will only take a moment.

step1.title: Privacy & Consent
step1.subtitle: Before you get started, we need your consent.
step1.termsRequired: I accept the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
step1.bodyDataOptional: I allow the processing of my body data (weight, height, body composition).
step1.nutritionOptional: I allow the processing of my nutrition diary.
step1.requiredConsent: You must accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.

step2.title: Your Profile
step2.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself.
step2.avatarTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum 5 MB.
step2.avatarInvalidType: Invalid file type. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
step2.invalidName: Please enter a valid name (letters, hyphens only, max 100 characters).
step2.minorBlocked: Users under 16 require parental consent. Please contact us at kontakt@train-smarter.at.

step3.title: Your Role
step3.subtitle: How do you want to use Train Smarter?
step3.trainerDesc: I coach athletes, create training plans, and track their progress.
step3.athleteDesc: I follow my coach's training plans and track my progress.
step3.roleSaveError: Could not save role. Please try again.

legal.privacyIntro: Protecting your personal data is important to us. In this privacy policy, we inform you about what data we collect, for what purpose, and on what legal basis.
legal.privacyDataCategoriesText: We process the following categories of personal data:
legal.privacyDataCat1: Master data: Name, email address, date of birth, role (Coach/Athlete)
legal.privacyDataCat2: Access data: Email address, encrypted password
legal.privacyDataCat3: Body and wellness data (only with explicit consent): Weight, body measurements, sleep quality, wellness score
legal.privacyDataCat4: Nutrition data (only with explicit consent): Nutrition diary, macronutrients
legal.privacyDataCat5: Usage data: IP address (upon consent), session data, timestamps
legal.privacyDataCat6: Training data: Training plans, programs, sessions
legal.privacyLegalBasisText: The processing of your data is based on:
legal.privacyLegal1: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (Consent) — for body, wellness, and nutrition data
legal.privacyLegal2: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (Contract performance) — for master and training data
legal.privacyLegal3: Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR (Explicit consent) — body data is treated as health data
legal.privacyPurposeText: Your data is processed exclusively for providing the Train Smarter platform: training planning, athlete management, progress tracking, and communication between coach and athlete.
legal.privacyStorageText: Personal data is stored as long as your account is active. After a deletion request, a 30-day grace period applies, after which all data is permanently deleted. Audit log entries are retained for 12 months. Invitation tokens are deleted after 7 days.
legal.privacyProcessorsText: We use the following data processors, all of which have a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) and process data within the EEA:
legal.privacyProcessor1: Supabase Inc. — Database, authentication, storage (Region: eu-central-1, Frankfurt)
legal.privacyProcessor2: Vercel Inc. — Hosting, Edge Functions (EU region)
legal.privacyRightsText: You have the following rights under GDPR:
legal.privacyRight1: Right of access (Art. 15) — Overview of your stored data in Privacy Settings
legal.privacyRight2: Right to rectification (Art. 16) — Edit profile data anytime under Profile
legal.privacyRight3: Right to erasure (Art. 17) — Account deletion under Privacy Settings
legal.privacyRight4: Right to data portability (Art. 20) — Data export under Privacy Settings
legal.privacyRight5: Right to object (Art. 21) — Consents can be revoked anytime under Privacy Settings
legal.privacyContactText: For privacy requests beyond self-service, contact us at: datenschutz@train-smarter.at
legal.privacyComplaintText: You have the right to file a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority: Barichgasse 40-42, 1030 Vienna, dsb@dsb.gv.at
legal.imprintInfo: Information according to Austrian Media Act (MedienG) and E-Commerce Act (ECG)
legal.imprintDisputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are neither willing nor obligated to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration body.
legal.imprintLiabilityText: The content of this website has been created with the utmost care. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
legal.termsScopeText: These terms apply to the use of the Train Smarter platform (www.train-smarter.at). By registering and using the service, you accept these terms.
legal.termsServiceText: Train Smarter is a web-based training management platform for coaches and athletes. The platform enables training planning, athlete management, progress tracking, and communication.
legal.termsAccountText: A user account is required to use the service. You are responsible for the security of your account. Each person may only have one account.
legal.termsDataText: Personal data is processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and the GDPR.
legal.termsTerminationText: You can delete your account at any time via the Privacy Settings. After deletion, a 30-day grace period applies during which the account can be reactivated upon request.
legal.termsLiabilityText: We are not liable for data loss caused by force majeure, technical disruptions at third-party providers, or improper use. The platform is provided without guarantee of availability.
legal.termsChangesText: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. Significant changes will be announced by email. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.termsLawText: Austrian law applies. The place of jurisdiction is Vienna.
legal.legalNotice: Note: These texts serve as drafts and must be reviewed by a lawyer qualified in Austrian law before productive use.

privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.subtitle: Manage your consents, export your data, or delete your account.
privacy.consentsDescription: Overview of your granted consents. Mandatory consents cannot be revoked without deleting the account.
privacy.consentTermsDesc: Mandatory consent — required for platform usage
privacy.consentBodyDataDesc: Processing of weight, measurements, sleep, and wellness score
privacy.revokeDialogMessage: What happens when you revoke: Processing of this data category will stop immediately. Already collected data will remain until explicitly deleted.
privacy.trainerAccessDescription: Your coach can view the following data categories. You can change this in your connection settings.
privacy.noTrainerConnected: No coach connected. Connect with a coach to see this information.
privacy.dataStoredDescription: Overview of what data categories are stored for you (Art. 15 GDPR).
privacy.formalRequest: For formal access requests beyond self-service, contact us at:
privacy.exportDescription: Export all your stored data as a JSON file. The download starts immediately. Maximum 1 export per 30 days.
privacy.exportRequested: Your data export was downloaded successfully.
privacy.exportRateLimited: You already requested an export on {date}. Next export available from {nextDate}.
privacy.exportError: Could not request export. Please try again.
privacy.deleteDescription: Delete your account and all associated data permanently. This action can only be undone within 30 days via support.
privacy.deleteStep1Message: If you delete your account, the following will happen:
privacy.deleteConsequence1: Your account will be immediately deactivated (no more login possible)
privacy.deleteConsequence2: All active sessions will be invalidated
privacy.deleteConsequence4: Your profile picture will be deleted
privacy.deleteConsequence5: Your name and email will be anonymized
privacy.deleteConsequence6: After 30 days, all data will be permanently deleted
privacy.deleteGracePeriod: Within the 30-day period, you can only undo the deletion via support (kontakt@train-smarter.at).
privacy.deleteStep2Message: Enter your email address to confirm:
privacy.deleteEmailMismatch: The entered email does not match your account.
privacy.deleteSuccess: Your account has been scheduled for deletion. You will receive a confirmation email.
privacy.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.
privacy.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
